system.description: Skiing gear includes a pair of skis and poles. While wearing skis, the crew can cover 2 hexes per quarter over flat terrain as opposed to the usual 1 hex when traveling by foot. Additionally, moving through hills will not slow them down, as the difference is made on any downhill sections. Mountains increase travel time by 1 Quarter instead of 2 Quarters. Skis are ineffective at traversing loose snow hexes, and should be swapped out in favor of snowshoes. Skis only count as 1 Load while worn instead of the 2 Load required to lug them around.
